timeline.content: Fed官员警告通胀风险上升，利率政策两难
Trump convenes national security team amid escalating Iran conflict
Brent crude above $109/barrel amid US military losses in Iran
US military assessing options after Iran refuses ceasefire
CDS trading volume surged 69pct Q1 2026 to $4.5 trillion, highest on record
US Feb job growth revised DOWN to minus 133K; biggest monthly job loss since Dec 2020. Stagflation signal
Trump convenes national security team as US Air Force has worst day in war; Iran refuses ceasefire
Trump asked if downed jet to impact talks: No its war (NBC)
Second US Warplane Lost: A-10 Warthog Crashes Near Hormuz
ISM Manufacturing PMI prices paid jumped 7.8pts to 78.3, highest since June 2022
Trump will not say what US will do if missing F-15E pilot is harmed. First aviator shot down over enemy territory since April 2003
Iran NOT willing to meet US officials in Pakistan; mediation round dead end. Turkey/Egypt still pushing
Witkoff and Kushner led Iran nuclear negotiations WITHOUT nuclear experts. Vance reportedly opposed the war
Iran downs 2 US warplanes, 2 missiles, 3 drones in single day. Iran calls it black day for US air forces
Trump on Iran: Keep the oil, anyone?
Brent crude rose 8pct to above $109/barrel after Trump renewed threats to destroy Iranian infrastructure
Trump放松对伊朗和俄罗斯石油制裁是豪赌，能否成功存疑
As Trump doubles down on Iran war, markets shudder and oil prices climb
Global leaders work to ease oil price surge as Trump signals more weeks of Iran war
Oil prices jump and shares drop after Trump threatens more Iran strikes
US oil has its biggest one-day price increase in six years
WTI原油涨幅超Brent，Trump讲话后美国油价特殊走强
Trump: hasnt even started destroying whats left of Iran
Trump猛批Obama伊朗核协议是灾难，称撕毁协议是荣幸
Oil Stocks and Gas Prices Swing After Trump Speech on Iran
US oil prices soar 11pct as Trump Iran war speech stokes fears of further escalation
US to leave Iran pretty quickly and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters
US, Iran Negotiating Ceasefire Deal In Exchange For Hormuz Reopening
中巴提出新伊朗协议：停火换取重新开放霍尔木兹海峡

sentiment_summary.market: 恐慌（油价>$109/桶，股市下跌，滞胀信号）
sentiment_summary.diplomatic: 僵局（伊朗拒绝谈判，调解失败）
sentiment_summary.military: 激化（美机被击落，飞行员失踪）

findings: 伊朗4月4日单日击落2架美机、2枚导弹、3架无人机（美军最黑暗的一天）
F-15E飞行员失踪，Trump拒绝透露应对方案（2003年来首次）
Trump：还没开始摧毁伊朗剩余目标
Trump清洗反对地面战争的将军们
伊朗拒绝Trump 48小时停火最后通牒
伊朗不愿在巴基斯坦会见美方官员，调解陷入死胡同
Witkoff和Kushner主导核谈判（无核专家参与），Vance反对战争
卡塔尔拒绝担任首席调解人
布伦特原油突破$109/桶，Trump威胁后暴涨8%
WTI单日暴涨11%，创六年来最大涨幅
Q1 CDS交易量激增69%至$4.5万亿（历史最高）
标普五周连跌，市场极度恐慌
